calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Default Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-04-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Michael J. Kallis, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Raibon & Colbert Associates, Inc.
Witness Gary Colbert was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Alvarez Environmental Services, LLP.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Raibon & Colbert Associates, Inc, and against the Defaulted Defendant Alvarez Environmental gServices, LLC as follows:

Damages/Principal - $16,604.55
Prejudgment Interest - $1,540.55
Attorney Fees - $0.00
Costs - $420.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $18,565.10.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Continued To Jun-26-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
